department: Department of Radiology and Imaging Sciences
tagline: Medical Imaging AI · Virtual Imaging Trials · Data-Centric AI
mission: The Tushar Lab is a newly established research group at the University of Arizona, focused on building rigorous, clinically relevant AI for medical imaging. Our work spans virtual imaging trials, synthetic data generation, and data-centric methods—aiming to make medical AI more trustworthy, reproducible, and grounded in clinical reality.
